title: Your Agent Is Wasting Tokens and You Don't Know It - Erik Hanchett, AWS
summary: Erik Hanchett shares three production-tested cost optimization techniques for AI agents: reducing unnecessary model calls, avoiding overuse of expensive models, and shortening tool-use loops. He demonstrates code examples for prompt caching and model routing without requiring prompt changes or model switches.
writeup: Erik Hanchett of AWS diagnoses three sources of cost overruns in production agents: inefficient model selection, context expansion, and tool loops. The talk presents three code-level optimizations, including prompt caching and model routing, that cut costs without changing prompts or degrading quality. The relevance is direct for anyone running agents at scale: the savings come from inference plumbing rather than prompt rewrites, and the fixes are framed as concrete code changes.
